mapper.insert:
insert into ys_tb.ys_order(id, user_id, goods_id, status, addTime) values
(#{entity.id}, #{entity.userId}, #{entity.goodsId}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.addtime})

insert into ys_tb.ys_order(id, user_id, goods_id, status, addTime) values
(#{entity.id}, #{entity.userId}, #{entity.goodsId}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.addtime})
on duplicate key update id = values(id) , user_id = values(user_id) , goods_id = values(goods_id) , status = values(status) , addTime = values(addTime)

insert into ys_tb.ys_order(id, user_id, goods_id, status, quantity, unit_price, total_amount) values (#{cartItem.id}, #{cartItem.userId}, #{cartItem.itemId}, #{cartItem.statusEnum}, #{cartItem.num}, #{cartItem.price}, (#{cartItem.price} * #{cartItem.num}))
mapper.update: update ys_tb.ys_order set status = #{code} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT addr.addr "addr", o.id "orderId", us.username "username", us.email "email", us.tel "tel", goods.introduce "introduce" FROM ys_order o, ys_goods goods, ys_user us, ys_user_addr addr WHERE o.user_id = us.id AND o.goods_id = goods.id and addr.is_main = '1' AND us.id = addr.user_id AND o.id = #{orderId}
select * from ys_tb.ys_order where user_id = #{userId} order by addTime desc
